texto: Teenagers are complicated and at times stubborn, yes, but we are not dumb. We see the world in a different light than the rest do, and sometimes, we’re misunderstood because of it. And that’s alright. That must be the definition of ‘human being’: Misunderstood. But neither of us should tolerate degradation in any of it forms.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Pamela Nicole sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Teenagers are complicated and at times stubborn, yes, but we are not dumb. We see the world in a …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, fitting-in, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.

texto: I turned to the window. A single raindrop fell against it, and seeing my reflection in the glass, I suddenly knew why Finn’s eyes were familiar.They were exactly like mine.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pamela Nicole: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I turned to the window. A single raindrop fell against it, and seeing my reflection in the glass,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, book, characters pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e characters.

texto: We won’t be able to choose who we’ll have to talk to in order to keep advancing in life. We won’t always like them, and they will most likely not like us back either, so it’s wrong to confine ourselves in our own little worlds when there’s plenty of it outside to explore.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pamela Nicole: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “We won’t be able to choose who we’ll have to talk to in order to keep advancing in life. We won’t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fitting-in, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e teenagers.
